illustration.alt: A glowing deep sea anglerfish in dark water with its bioluminescent lure

illustration.alt: The submarine surfacing back to sunlit ocean waters

porthole.definition: A small round window in the side of a ship or submarine

bioluminescent.definition: Producing natural light through a chemical reaction
